LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE WEBER'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, AND TO: 1) CONDITIONALLY CERTIFY THE CLASS FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES 2) APPROVE THE FORM AND METHOD OF NOTICE 3) ESTABLISH OPT-OUT, OBJECTION AND CLAIM PROCEDURES; 4) SCHEDULE A FINAL FAIRNESS HEARING IS CONTINUED TO JULY 5, 2013 FOR HEARING. LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE WEBER'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, AND TO: 1) CONDITIONALLY CERTIFY THE CLASS FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES 2) APPROVE THE FORM AND METHOD OF NOTICE3) ESTABLISH OPT-OUT, OBJECTION AND CLAIM PROCEDURES, AND 4) SCHEDULE A FINAL FAIRNESS HEARING IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS WITH THE FOLLOWING CHANGES TO THE IMPLEMENTATION SCHEDULE ON PAGE 3, PARAGRAPH 10, SUBPARAGRAPHS C,,D., AND E: CHANGE EACH TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2013 (SINCE SEPTEMBER 2, 2013 IS LABOR DAY). Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prelim Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And To: 1) Conditionally Certify The Class For Settlement Purposes. 2) Approve The Form And Method Of Notice; 3) Establish Opt-Out, Objection And Claim Procedures; 4) Schedule A Final Fairness Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MICHELLE WEBER's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And To: 1) Conditionally Certify The Class For Settlement Purposes 2) Approve The Form And Method Of Notice3) Establish Opt-Out, Objection And Claim Procedures, and 4) Schedule A Final Fairness Hearing is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed Order Granting Preliminary Approval of Class Action Settlement submitted with the moving papers with the following changes to the implementation schedule on page 3, paragraph 10, subparagraphs c,,d., and e: change each to September 3, 2013 (since September 2, 2013 is Labor Day). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
